title: lesser and pavey Dinosaur Drinking Bottle for Kids | 1 Piece | Multicoloured | 400 ml
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Plastic Water Bottle | For Kids | 1 pc
PLAYFUL DESIGN: The dinosaur design on this water bottle is impressive and unique, making it ideal for boy kids who enjoy dinosaurs!
CONVENIENT: It fits most backpacks' side pockets, so it's great for kids' water bottles for school or any active lifestyle.
ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIAL: This water bottle will not break easily since it is made of high-quality, eco-friendly, reusable, leak-proof plastic.
SAFE AND FUNCTIONAL: The water bottle is 100% BPA & toxin-free, odor free, and healthy for your daily water drinking. It is perfect for kids' outdoor, running, and any school activities.
description: From the manufacturer About us Established in 1971 by chairman and co-founder Ronnie Pavey, Lesser & Pavey have become one of the leading UK Trade Supplier of Giftware & Homewares. By priding ourselves on fantastic quality at great value for money, our brand "The Leonardo Collection" has become renowned worldwide. There's a huge range of Homeware, Ladies & Gents, Novelty and Souvenir gifts, plus seasonal lines for Birthdays, Christmas, Weddings and more. Whilst walking round, something is bound to catch your eye also which you might have otherwise missed.
